courseTitle: Business, Ethics, Accessibility, and Player Research
title: Funding Pitch Prototype
genericDescription: Align prototype with grant, publisher, client, or investor expectations; define scope and budget; communicate risk honestly.
specificDescription: Build a prototype intended for one funding context. Submit a two-page pitch brief including audience, budget category, timeline, comparable works, and risk.
gradingRubric: 30 pts prototype-pitch alignment; 20 pts business clarity; 20 pts scope realism; 15 pts game quality; 15 pts presentation.
